title: Independent clinics losing revenue from missed insurance follow-up
text: Clinic managers say claims follow-up is still manual, backlog is growing weekly, and delayed reimbursements are hurting cash flow. They want a reliable workflow for triage, status checks, and reminder emails.

title: Sellers overwhelmed by chargeback evidence preparation
text: Small ecommerce sellers report repetitive manual document gathering for each dispute. Lost disputes are cutting profit margin. They need faster evidence packaging and submission reminders.

title: Agency inbox follow-up chaos causing missed deals
text: Our sales inbox is a mess, leads are missed daily, follow-up is manual, and conversion is dropping. Looking for an automated qualification and scheduling process.

title: Warehouse teams waste hours on manual receiving reconciliation
text: COO describes daily spreadsheet reconciliation between purchase orders and received goods, frequent error corrections, and weekly stockout surprises that hurt sales.

title: Team wants nicer logo colors
text: A founder wants a new logo palette and brainstorming support for a site refresh.

title: Local logistics operators struggle with late invoice collection
text: Dispatch and accounting teams manually chase outstanding invoices each week. Late follow-up delays payroll and limits fuel purchases. They need automated reminders, call prep notes, and payment tracking reports.
